features.name: Dashboard
features.plain_english: The main screen showing real-time weather, air quality, UV index, humidity, and a 7-day forecast all in one place.

features.name: Health Analysis
features.plain_english: Checks how today's weather might affect your health — breathing problems, headaches, and fatigue risks with an AI summary.

features.name: AI Recommendations
features.plain_english: Gives you personalized daily tips on what to wear, eat, drink, and do, based on weather and your health profile.

features.name: AI Chat
features.plain_english: A chatbot where you can ask any question about weather and your health, and get answers in Thai with web search.

features.name: Weekly Reports
features.plain_english: Shows weekly health summaries with bar charts, trends, and a table so you can track how your health changes over time.

features.name: City Search (Geocoding)
features.plain_english: Lets you search for any city by name and picks the right location before showing weather and health data.

features.name: Weather Data API
features.plain_english: Server that fetches real-time weather, 7-day forecasts, air quality, UV index, and city search from Open-Meteo and saves them to the database.

features.name: Health Analysis Backend
features.plain_english: Server that reads weather data and user health profiles, calculates health risks, and generates AI health summaries in Thai.

features.name: Recommendations Backend
features.plain_english: Server that generates personalized activity, clothing, hydration, food menu, and mood suggestions using AI.

features.name: Chat Backend
features.plain_english: Server that handles chat conversations — searches the web for recent info, then asks Typhoon AI to answer in Thai.

features.name: Reports Backend
features.plain_english: Server that queries the past 7 days of health analyses and generates a weekly summary report with AI.

features.name: Database
features.plain_english: PostgreSQL database on Supabase with 7 tables — users, health profiles, weather records, health analysis, recommendations, chat history, and reports.

features.name: Infrastructure
features.plain_english: Configuration for deploying the app with Docker, Vercel (frontend), and Render (backend), plus auth middleware and error handling.

external_services.name: Open-Meteo
external_services.purpose: Free weather API providing forecasts, air quality data, UV index, and city geocoding lookups.

external_services.name: Typhoon AI
external_services.purpose: Thai-language LLM (typhoon-v2.5-30b) that generates health analysis, recommendations, chat answers, food menu ideas, and mood insights.

external_services.name: Supabase
external_services.purpose: Cloud-hosted PostgreSQL database storing all user data, weather records, health analyses, and chat history.

external_services.name: DuckDuckGo Search
external_services.purpose: Web search engine used by the AI Chat to find current information before generating answers.
